name: EZPAWN
description_short: Englewood, CO's EZPAWN location at 5030 S Broadway provides pawn loans and jewelry/electronics buying services.
description_long:
Located at 5030 S Broadway in Englewood, CO, this EZPAWN location serves the local community with pawn and lending services. The shop operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturdays from 9 AM to 6 PM, and is closed Sundays.

At this Englewood location, customers can get pawn loans on jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and other valuables. You can also sell items directly for quick cash. For questions about pawn services or to inquire about specific items, call 303-761-3240.

If you're looking for a pawn shop in Englewood, this location provides fair deals and straightforward transactions. Bring a valid government-issued ID and the items you wish to pawn or sell. Whether you need emergency cash or are downsizing, this EZPAWN in Englewood offers a convenient solution.
pros: Same-day cash without credit checks or income verification required
Secure on-site firearms storage facility with professional handling
Expert gold and diamond buyers offering fair market pricing with testing
25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand-name merchandise (Samsung, Apple, etc.)
Extended store hours until 7 pm weekdays and Saturdays for working customers
EZ+ Rewards Program earning points on pawns, purchases, and redemptions with online account management
Instant Quote online tool providing equipment valuations before in-person visits
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down) and Take Today financing up to 12 months
cons: Pawned items become permanent store property if loan and fees aren't repaid—customers lose collateral entirely
Online payment functionality unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania, limiting digital account management in those states
All merchandise is pre-owned; brand owners explicitly disclaim affiliation or endorsement with EZPAWN
Firearm redemptions subject to background checks and additional conditions, creating delays and potential denial
Service availability varies by location; not all services offered at all stores, creating inconsistent customer experience
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash who own items of resale value and can afford to lose collateral
Firearms owners seeking secure storage and fair loan valuations on guns and collectibles
Bargain hunters seeking 25-70% discounts on pre-owned electronics, jewelry, and brand-name merchandise
Individuals without traditional credit access (poor credit, no credit history, undocumented) who need emergency funds
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for consumers with items of value who need same-day cash without credit qualification and can accept the risk of losing collateral if unable to repay. The primary caveat is the forfeiture risk inherent in pawn lending—this is fundamentally different from installment or unsecured personal loans because failure to repay results in permanent loss of the pledged item, making it suitable only for non-essential belongings.
services: Pawn loans on items in decent working condition for immediate cash
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert evaluation and testing
Firearms pawn loans and sales with secure on-site storage facility
Retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25-70% discounts
Layaway purchases with 10% down and monthly payments
Take Today third-party financing plans up to 12 months
Instant Quote online tool for electronics valuation
EZ+ Rewards Program with online account management and payment options
Product Protection Plans for electronics and audio/video equipment
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning/replacement
Online shop with daily new arrivals and inventory browsing
meta_description: EZPAWN at 5030 S Broadway, Englewood, CO. Pawn loans, buying, and selling services for jewelry and electronics.
